title: erigeron chrysopsidis var. brevifolius
intro: Erigeron chrysopsidis var. brevifolius, also known as the Fleabane, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and soothe skin irritations. Erigeron chrysopsidis var. brevifolius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for internal use, while its leaves and flowers can be used in topical applications to address various health concerns.
